value.author: platine
value.layerInfo: Brand dot-pattern generator. Fills a lattice of dots driven by the Platine logo (static hexagram) or the live 3D-rotated logo silhouette, from crisp halftone to abstract. Pair it as its own layer above/below the Platine FCC Lattice and match the 3D params to overlay the rotating logo.

patternSize: Size in pixels of the area the dots fill (used for the static logo; the 3D source auto-fits the logo).
latticeType: Dot grid: Triangular (the logo's own FCC packing), Square, or Concentric rings.
spacing: Distance between dots in pixels. Smaller = finer halftone.
rot2d: Rotate the whole dot composition in 2D (degrees).
dotSize: Dot radius as a fraction of spacing (1 = touching).
sizeField: Scale each dot by the field value, so dots grow toward the logo/centre.
jitter: Randomly nudge dots off the lattice for an organic look.
symmetry: Fold the field for mirror / 6-fold symmetric patterns (static source).
seed: Random seed for noise, scatter, size and jitter.
shapeSource: Static Logo = fixed hexagram. 3D Logo = sample the live rotating logo silhouette (set the 3D params below to match the FCC layer).
abstractLogo: 0 = organic noise (abstract). 1 = the dots resolve into the logo. Blend anywhere between.
logoScale: Size of the static logo within the pattern area.
tile: Repeat the static logo as a tiled motif (1 = single logo).
edgeSoftness: Softness of the shape edge the dots sample.
invert: Fill the dots around the shape instead of inside it.
density: How many dots appear (threshold on the field).
noiseScale: Scale of the organic noise used at the Abstract end.
scatter: Randomise dot presence for a looser, more abstract fill.
cells: Unit cells per axis — match the Platine FCC layer.
latticeSize: Logo scale in pixels — match the Platine FCC layer.
atomSize: Atom radius — match the Platine FCC layer. Controls the silhouette thickness.
animMode: Match the Platine FCC layer (Keyframe / Spin / Swing / Tumble).
spinAxis: Which axis or axes to spin around.
spinSpeed: Degrees per second, or per loop when Loop Frames is set.
swingSpeed: Cycles per second, or per loop when Loop Frames is set.
swingRange: Total arc of the swing in degrees.
swingEase: Easing function applied to the swing.
oscOn: Add a sinusoidal oscillation on top of the animation.
oscFreq: Cycles per second, or per loop when Loop Frames is set.
loopFrames: Match the Platine FCC layer for a perfect loop. 0 = free-running.
